negative_log_marginal_likelihood(ell, x_train, sigma_n, n_order, n_bases, der_indices)[source]

NLL for standard GP in multiple dimensions.

NLL = 0.5 * y^T (K^-1) y + 0.5 * log|K| + 0.5*N*log(2*pi).

optimize_hyperparameters()[source]
predict(X_test, length_scales, calc_cov=False, return_deriv=False)[source]

Compute posterior predictive mean and covariance at X_test under an ARD RBF kernel with given length_scales.
